title: ctenopteris nubigena
intro: Ctenopteris nubigena, also known as the New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in antioxidants and contain flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Ctenopteris nubigena can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
